 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75858485</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Thailand election: PM Anutin Charnvirakul claims victory]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T15:50:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T15:50:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/thailand-election-pm-anutin-charnvirakul-claims-victory/a-75858485?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Early projections have Thailand's prime minister winning by a clear margin, with the opposition conceding defeat in Thailand's parliamentary elections.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75861999</id>
  <title><![CDATA[UK leader's chief of staff resigns over appointment of ambassador named in 'Epstein files']]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T15:11:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T15:11:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/uk-leader-s-chief-of-staff-resigns-over-appointment-of-ambassador-named-in-epstein-files/a-75861999?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Prime Minister Keir Starmer's top aide Morgan McSweeney has quit amid fallout over the appointment of Britain's US ambassador. Criticism has mounted as new details emerged of the appointee's links to Jeffrey Epstein.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75861484</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany's Aicher wins Olympic ski silver as Vonn crashes]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T14:45:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T14:45:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-s-aicher-wins-olympic-ski-silver-as-vonn-crashes/a-75861484?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Germany has earned its first medal of the Winter Games as Emma Aicher finished second in a tight downhill ski race. The event was disrupted after US skier Lindsey Vonn was airlifted away following a severe fall.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75789039</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Are the pieces of the Berlin Wall  sold as souvenirs fake or the real deal?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T14:21:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T14:21:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/are-the-pieces-of-the-berlin-wall-sold-as-souvenirs-fake-or-the-real-deal/a-75789039?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[It's been nearly 40 years since the fall of the Berlin Wall but you can still buy pieces of it in the German capital as souvenirs. Are they genuine?]]></summary>
  <category term="Culture"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75716067</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Why scientists warn of privately funded geoengineering]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T13:58:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T13:58:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/why-scientists-warn-of-privately-funded-geoengineering/a-75716067?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[As the climate crisis intensifies, interest in solar engineering is increasing, including among private companies and investors. But the technique is controversial and lacks regulation.]]></summary>
  <category term="Climate"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75842138</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Could Hungary win its case against the EU's Russian gas ban?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T13:56:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T13:56:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/could-hungary-win-its-case-against-the-eu-s-russian-gas-ban/a-75842138?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The EU has banned the import of all Russian gas by the end of 2027. Hungary is taking the matter to the European Court of Justice — and some legal experts think it might have a chance.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75858163</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Japan election: Sanae Takaichi's LDP set for majority]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T12:40:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T12:40:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/japan-election-sanae-takaichi-s-ldp-set-for-majority/a-75858163?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Takaichi's Liberal Democratic Party is set to secure a large majority ‌in Japan's lower house of parliament, projections showed. The prime minister has sought a strong mandate for her conservative agenda.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75860227</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany news: SPD urges Trump-era reset in ties with US]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T10:43:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T10:43:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-news-spd-urges-trump-era-reset-in-ties-with-us/live-75860227?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The Social Democrats want to rethink relations with the US, arguing that Trump's approach to international affairs raises doubts about trans-Atlantic ties. Meanwhile, phone scammers are taking a hit. DW has more.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75859699</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Arrest in Dubai after shooting of Russian general — FSB]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T09:46:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T09:46:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/arrest-in-dubai-after-shooting-of-russian-general-fsb/a-75859699?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A Russian national has been detained in the United Arab Emirates in connection with Friday's shooting of military intelligence officer ⁠Vladimir ‍Alekseyev. The Kremlin blamed Ukraine for the attempted assassination.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75859623</id>
  <title><![CDATA[India's Modi visits Malaysia amid deepening ties]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T08:22:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T08:22:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/india-s-modi-visits-malaysia-amid-deepening-ties/a-75859623?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Malaysian counterpart, Anwar Ibrahim, inked 11 agreements and pledged to deepen their collaboration on semiconductors.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75859100</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Portugal: Socialist tipped for presidential election win]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T08:02:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T08:02:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/portugal-socialist-tipped-for-presidential-election-win/a-75859100?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Though the far right reached the second round for the first time, veteran politician Antonio Jose Seguro is expected to win up to two-thirds of the vote.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75789462</id>
  <title><![CDATA[US, Russia vie for influence in Mali, Niger and Burkina Faso]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T05:58:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T05:58:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/us-russia-vie-for-influence-in-mali-niger-and-burkina-faso/a-75789462?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The United States is reshaping its approach to Mali, Niger and Burkina Faso as Russia expands the footprint of its Africa Corps across the Sahel region.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75858493</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Haiti's transitional council steps down, hands power to PM]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-08T03:35:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-08T03:35:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/haiti-s-transitional-council-steps-down-hands-power-to-pm/a-75858493?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Haiti has entered a state of political limbo with the US-backed Prime Minister Alix Didier Fils-Aime facing the daunting task of holding elections in the violence-gripped country.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75858162</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Washington Post publisher resigns after job cut uproar]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T23:42:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T23:42:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/washington-post-publisher-resigns-after-job-cut-uproar/a-75858162?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The publisher and CEO of the Washington Post, Will Lewis, is leaving following massive layoffs at the US newspaper earlier this week.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75858125</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Milan: Protest ends in clashes near Olympic Village]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T22:59:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T22:59:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/milan-protest-ends-in-clashes-near-olympic-village/a-75858125?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Police used tear gas and water cannons on dozens of protesters near the Olympic Village in Milan. Protesters were demonstrating over the environmental impact of the games and also the presence of US ICE agents.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75857509</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Syria and Saudi Arabia sign major investment package]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T21:49:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T21:49:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/syria-and-saudi-arabia-sign-major-investment-package/a-75857509?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The government in Damascus and the kingdom signed a series of agreements in key areas, including telecommunications and aviation. Syria is looking to strengthen its economy after years of civil war.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75790721</id>
  <title><![CDATA[How the Epstein-Barr virus triggers MS in some people]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T20:32:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T20:32:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/how-the-epstein-barr-virus-triggers-ms-in-some-people/a-75790721?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Multiple sclerosis is also caused by a virus carried by almost all humans. A new study provides an explanation as to why only certain people develop the disease. This also opens up the possibility of a treatment.]]></summary>
  <category term="Science"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75857039</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Greenland, Denmark say US talks positive but future unclear]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T20:18:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T20:18:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/greenland-denmark-say-us-talks-positive-but-future-unclear/a-75857039?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The foreign ministers of Greenland and Denmark say they hope to resolve the existential threat posed to both by US President Donald Trump's obsession with taking possession of the autonomous Arctic territory.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75831436</id>
  <title><![CDATA[How nonviolent protest can break autocratic rule]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T19:44:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T19:44:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/how-nonviolent-protest-can-break-autocratic-rule/a-75831436?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[People in Minnesota have used creative tactics to push back against ICE. History shows that nonviolent resistance can topple authoritarian power. But how?]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75855214</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Families call for truth on Kosovo War's missing people]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T19:28:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T19:28:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/families-call-for-truth-on-kosovo-war-s-missing-people/a-75855214?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Some 1,600 people are still missing from the Kosovo War, though it ended nearly three decades ago. Serbia has blocked efforts to shed light on their fates. But now, Kosovo and Serbia's joint commission has finally met.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75856210</id>
  <title><![CDATA[France: Ex-minister Jack Lang resigns amid Epstein probe]]></title>
  <updated>2026-02-07T19:15:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-02-07T19:15:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/france-ex-minister-jack-lang-resigns-amid-epstein-probe/a-75856210?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Before resigning from a leading Paris cultural center, Lang said the probe against him was "baseless." His name appeared more than 670 times in the files relating to the late, disgraced financier Jeffrey Epstein.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
</feed>
